name: nvim-industrial
description: Industrial sound effects for your editor. Every keystroke is a hammer strike. Every save, an explosion.

industrial.enabled.description: Master on/off switch for all industrial sound effects.

industrial.minInterval.description: Minimum milliseconds between replays of the same sound.

industrial.globalMinInterval.description: Minimum milliseconds between any two sounds (overlap guard).

industrial.debounceMs.description: Leading-edge debounce interval for the typing sound (ms). The first keystroke plays immediately; subsequent keystrokes within this window are silent.

industrial.events.textChange.description: Sound for text changes (typing). Empty string to disable.

industrial.events.editorFocus.description: Sound when switching to a different text editor. Empty string to disable.

industrial.events.save.description: Sound for file save. Empty string to disable.

industrial.events.open.description: Sound for opening a file. Empty string to disable.

industrial.events.close.description: Sound for closing a file. Empty string to disable.

industrial.events.startup.description: Sound when the extension activates (VSCode startup). Empty string to disable.

industrial.events.shutdown.description: Sound when VSCode shuts down. Empty string to disable.
